title: corybas selangorensis
intro: Corybas selangorensis, also known as the Selangor corybas, is a type of terrestrial orchid found in the tropical forests of Malaysia and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The leaves and roots of the Corybas selangorensis plant are used to prepare herbal remedies, which are said to have various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat a range of health issues.
